summary: Experiment l3a-parse: verdict FAIL. Hypotheses: HL3a. Endpoints: primary(primary)=0.4407050039925458; sec-refusal-retention(secondary)=False; sec-fail-closed-dangerous(secondary)=False; sec-stage-breakdown(secondary)={'frame-ambiguous': 41, 'frame-miss': 228, 'gazetteer-miss': 40, 'mapper-abstain': 48}; sec-cost(secondary)=266.8197988505747. Kill criterion (verbatim): HL3a clause 2 (architecture-ladder.md section 5.1, frozen verbatim in registry/experiments/l3a.json): 'mapper-parse loses > a pre-declared fraction of gold-parse accuracy (the NL boundary eats the rung; L3 waits for a better parser, not more GPU)'. THIS RECORD instantiates the pre-declared fraction at 10% absolute: FAIL iff the mapper-parse covered-exact one-sided Wilson 95% UB <= 0.90, OR the covered wrong-answer one-sided Wilson 95% LB >= 0.02 (fail-closed demonstrably broken — a mis-parse that answers wrongly with provenance attached is worse than any refusal). Either FAIL routes investment to the parser stage named by the stage-breakdown, never to GPU. Clause 3 (LLM/RAG cost differentiator) belongs to l3a-cost and cannot be decided here. Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Measured range: R0 — no host model; ONE deterministic front-end build (mapper a1-hybrid policy sha e13dc838…, one entity gazetteer, one frozen frame rule set), ONE blind agent-authored held-out phrasing set (K=1 per query, design-doc section-5 protocol), the parents' frozen eval/stores byte-identical, and the engine behaviourally parent-perfect on the parent eval, re-verified IN-RUN by gate G2 (the engine sha differs from the parent-frozen pin — design doc 10.9 / 14.8 item 8, ASM-0147; no byte-identity is claimed). A PASS licenses only: the 7-FAMILY SHAPE-RECOVERABLE SLICE of the closed kot-query/1 grammar (n=527; FK-NLB-10 / ASM-0420, design doc 14.2) is reachable from THESE held-out NL phrasings by a deterministic training-free front-end with <=10% covered-exactness loss and an intact fail-closed contract, on the family/world vertical — the gate needed for an honest NL leg in l3a-cost, inherited by l3a-cost ONLY at the same 7-family slice with the unique-maker/made-lookup exclusion restated. It licenses NOTHING about the two shape-ambiguous families (unique-maker 43, made-lookup 30): those 73 items are carried as a MEASURED partial-negative (/analysis/shape_ambiguous_stratum, descriptive only), not silence, and NO whole-closed-grammar reachability claim survives this record. It licenses NO natural-user-distribution robustness claim, NO other phrasing distribution/corpus/domain/language, NO paraphrase-set-size scaling, NO LLM-comparative accuracy or cost claim, NO statement about kernel usefulness to any model, and NO cross-vertical conjunction (a5-nl licenses the code vertical separately). A FAIL indicts the named front-end stage and licenses exactly the kill's routing: parser investment, not GPU.
title: Registry verdict: l3a-parse
